rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are declared or visible in the same annex scope before use.
Resolve type errors by aligning helper declarations with their expression types and avoiding invalid scalar type names.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are properly declared or visible in the current scope.
Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in constant and equation declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Guarantees should relate visible inputs to outputs without relying on implementation-only subcomponents.
anti_patterns: Do not reference undefined identifiers or use invalid scalar type names in AGREE declarations.
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
